title: Entrepreneurship Development Program (EDP)
content: Entrepreneurship Development Program (EDP) Event Date : 19 Nov, 2024 to 6 Dec,2024 Event brief description: The Entrepreneurship Development Program (EDP), conducted at Galgotias University under the aegis of Skill India, Government of India, is a pioneering initiative to foster entrepreneurial skills among students and professionals. This program aims to empower participants with the essential tools to establish and sustain successful ventures, aligning with the vision of Aatmanirbhar Bharat (Self-reliant India). Event Detailed Description: The primary objectives of the EDP at Galgotias University are as follows: - To develop entrepreneurial competencies among participants. - To foster innovation and creativity in business ideation and execution. - To provide practical insights into starting and managing a business. - To create an ecosystem that encourages start-ups and innovation. - To align participants with the vision of “Aatmanirbhar Bharat” (Self-reliant India). - To upgrade students with entrepreneurship skills and job opportunities. Program Structure- The EDP at Galgotias University is structured into three phases: Phase 1: Awareness and Motivation Activities: - Introduction to entrepreneurship and its significance. - Case studies of successful entrepreneurs. - Motivational sessions by industry experts and government officials. Phase 2: Skill Development Activities: - Workshops on business planning, financial management, and marketing strategies. - Hands-on training in digital tools for business growth. - Interaction with start-up founders and venture capitalists. Phase 3: Business Execution and Mentorship Activities: - Guidance on preparing detailed project reports and business plans. - Mock pitching sessions to refine presentation skills. - Mentorship by faculty members and industry professionals. - Networking events with potential investors. Mentor Name - Kapil Kumar Parashar- Kapil has a long history of delivering integrated digital and smart services in India and Abroad. Kapil has 20 years exp. in the field of Electronics, Broadcasting, CRM, Pi Platform, IoT, M2M and Networking. He has delivered telehealth, Pi platform, M2M and IoT projects in India and Abroad. He has written articles about Integrated health and caring for PhD Chamber and several news agencies in India. He is running several training centers in India and a broad in the field of Integrated services and multiskilling. He also invested in many rural and smart care projects in India and abroad. Department Name –University Polytechnic Event Outcome - Increased entrepreneurial inclination among participants. - Successful incubation of start-up ideas in sectors like technology, healthcare, and education. - Enhanced employability through practical skill development. - A strong network of budding entrepreneurs and mentors.
